creative_brief: Hero image: Rachel in a working farm setting, candid and unpolished — not a studio portrait. Muted earth tones, natural light. Below the fold, a simple visual showing the short supply chain: farm icon → hub icon → family icon. No stock photography. The page should feel like a letter, not a billboard.
headline: Do you actually know what your kids ate for dinner last night?
subhead: Not the meal — the supply chain. Where it grew, who picked it, how far it travelled. FarmThru is a farm-direct grocery store opening to investors for the first time. VIP spots are limited.
hero_copy:
Most parents can name every ingredient in the recipe. Almost none can name the farm. That gap between what we cook and what we know haunts every grocery run. FarmThru closes it — a hub-and-collect grocery store that connects you directly with regenerative farms across NSW. No unnecessary middlemen. No mystery produce.

Right now, before our equity crowdfunding campaign goes live on Birchal in mid-2026, a limited number of VIP spots are open. A $5 refundable deposit holds yours.

sections.heading: The question that started this
sections.body:
Rachel asked it at a school pickup. Another parent mentioned a recall — leafy greens, contamination, origin unknown. She looked at her fridge that night and realised she couldn't trace a single item back to where it grew. Not one.

That's not a personal failing. It's a system designed to keep you in the dark. Supermarkets move produce an average of 2,400km before it hits the shelf. By the time it reaches you, the farm is invisible.

FarmThru was built to fix that. We partner with roughly 15–20 farms and suppliers across NSW. You order online, collect from our Brookvale hub Monday to Friday — or get delivery across Sydney, Central Coast, and Wollongong. Every product traces back to a real farm, a real grower. No lock-in. No membership fees. Order when you want.

sections.heading: Why VIP spots won't last
sections.body:
We're opening our equity crowdfunding campaign on Birchal in mid-2026. Before that happens, we're giving a limited number of people first access — priority updates, exclusive Q&A with our team, and the chance to invest before the general public.

Minimum investment starts at $50. Maximum is $10,000 per investor. But VIP access costs just a $5 refundable deposit. Fully refundable, no commitment, no obligation to invest.

This isn't about watching from the sidelines. It's about owning a piece of a food system that actually shows you where your groceries come from. The VIP list closes when it's full. We won't reopen it.

sections.heading: What you're actually backing
sections.body:
FarmThru is a farm-direct grocery store. Hub-and-collect model. We buy from regenerative farms, cut the unnecessary middlemen, and pass the transparency (and the savings from bulk buying) to you.

No subscription. No lock-in. You order what you need, when you need it. Collect from Brookvale Monday to Friday, or choose delivery if you're across Sydney, Central Coast, or Wollongong.

Be part of it — not as a customer waiting for someone else to fix the food system, but as a partner who owns a piece of the solution.

sections.heading: Compliance
sections.body: FarmThru's equity crowdfunding campaign will be hosted on Birchal. Investing in equity crowdfunding carries risks, including the potential loss of your entire investment. This is not financial advice. You should consider whether this investment is appropriate for your circumstances and read the offer document in full before making any investment decision. Any investment made through the Birchal platform is subject to the terms and conditions of that platform.
